title: chamaecrista nictitans var. glaberrima
intro: Chamaecrista nictitans var. glaberrima, also known as sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a variety of flowering plant native to tropical regions of the Americas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Chamaecrista nictitans var. glaberrima have been associated with various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support skin health and alleviate digestive issues.
